request.question: What is the name of the Federation of Sol flagship in Twilight Imperium 4, and what are its stats and ability?

messages.content: What is the name of the Federation of Sol flagship in Twilight Imperium 4, and what are its stats and ability?

answer.raw_text:
**Federation of Sol – Flagship** | Item | Details | |------|---------| | **Name** | **The Sovereign** (the official Sol flagship) | | **Ship‑type** | Super‑Star‑Destroyer (the flagship class for the Sol faction) | | **Base Stats** | • **Attack:** 5
• **Defense:** 4
• **Movement:** 1 (standard for flagships)
• **Capacity:** 6 (the number of command tokens it can hold)
• **Command Value:** 6 (used for fleet‑command effects) | | **Special Ability** | **Solar Flare** – *When you gain a resource token from a planet (whether by founding, capturing, or producing), you may immediately gain **one additional resource token of any type** of your choice.*
• The extra token can be spent that same turn (e.g., to purchase a technology, build a unit, or activate a strategy card).
• The ability can trigger **multiple times** if the flag­ship gains resources from several planets in the same round (once per planet that yields a token). | | **Flavor / Thematic Note** | The Sovereign is the flagship of the Sol Federation, a human‑led coalition famed for its mastery of solar energy. The “Solar Flare” ability reflects the faction’s ability to harvest excess solar power and convert it into any resource they need at the moment. | --- ### How the Ability Works in Play 1. **Trigger** – Whenever a planet you control **produces** a resource token (for example, when you gain a **Food**, **Metal**, **Carbon**, **Science**, or **Trade** token from that planet), you may activate Solar Flare. 2. **Choice** – After the original token is placed on the planet, you may immediately take **one extra token of any resource type** (including the same type you just received). 3. **Spend / Store** – The extra token can be used right away (e.g., to pay the cost of a technology, to build a unit, or to activate a strategy card), or it can be kept in your pool for later turns. 4. **Limitations** – The ability can only be used **once per planet per round** and only **if the flag­ship is present in the system** where the planet resides (the flag­ship must be on the same space‑tile as the planet to “collect” its resources). --- ### Quick Tactical Take‑aways - **Resource Flexibility** – Because the extra token can be any type, the ability lets you pivot on the fly. If you’re short on metal to build a cruiser, you can pull a metal token from a different planet that produced science, and vice‑versa. - **Combo with Solar Systems** – Pair the flag­ship with **Solar Crystals** (the Sol‑specific technology that lets you gain extra resource tokens from planets) to maximise the number of triggers each round. - **Defensive Value** – The high attack (5) and defense (4) make the Sovereign one of the toughest ships on the board, so it can protect a key system while also “banking” resources. --- **Bottom line:** The Federation of Sol’s flagship, **The Sovereign**, combines strong combat stats (5/4/1/6) with a powerful resource‑generation ability (“Solar Flare”) that lets the Sol player convert any planet’s output into a flexible, extra resource of their choosing. This makes the flag­ship a cornerstone of both military and economic strategies for the Sol faction.
